evidence: frontend/src/App.tsx — route nested under ProtectedRoute with requiresAuth meta
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx — wraps content in DashboardLayout with pageBubbleId bTHDT
frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx — applies data-bubble-id bTHDT on shell root when pageBubbleId provided
frontend/src/lib/dashboard/routes.ts — exports ai_RNbBKLUh and ai_RNbBKLUi instance constants
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx — passes headerBubbleId and sidebarBubbleId to DashboardLayout
frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx — forwards instance ids to Header and AppSidebar
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx — data-bubble-id={bubbleId} on Sidebar root with dashboard override
ir/inventory.json — ai_RNbBKLUh and ai_RNbBKLUi are CustomElement children of bTHDT per bTHDU____root.json
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx — both profile branches wrap children in div with data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXRD and data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-DASHBOARD
ir/inventory.json — ai_RNbBHXRD is Group child of bTHDT (dashboard-main boundary)

functional_audit.check: /dashboard route registered and auth-guarded via ProtectedRoute parent
Dashboard page mounts AppShellLayout with page-level CustomElement instance overrides
Dashboard renders for both incomplete-profile and complete-profile states inside ai_RNbBHXRD boundary

ui_evidence.notes: Page root on DashboardLayout outer wrapper when Dashboard passes pageBubbleId
Dashboard-specific header CustomElement instance on Header via bubbleId override
Dashboard-specific sidebar CustomElement instance on AppSidebar via bubbleId override
dashboard-main content boundary wraps page children with data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-DASHBOARD

gaps.finding: IR places ai_RNbBKLUh, ai_RNbBKLUi, and ai_RNbBHXRD as bTHDT siblings; React shell still nests Header inside the main column to the right of the sidebar (inherited from SHELL-05). Page-instance markers are correct but full-width header sibling layout remains unresolved.

critiques.finding: SHELL-06 added correct page-instance bubble ids (ai_RNbBKLUh/ai_RNbBKLUi) but did not restructure DashboardLayout to match bTHDU sibling order (full-width header above sidebar+main row). Header remains nested in the right column per SHELL-05 shadcn SidebarProvider pattern.
critiques.alternative: Restructure DashboardLayout: offline banner → full-width Header (page instance) → flex row (sidebar instance | scrollable main containing only ai_RNbBHXRD children), aligning DOM hierarchy with IR page-root siblings.

critiques.finding: Decompose scope says 'no dashboard feature widgets' and AC-3 names a placeholder, but brownfield implementation retains the full prototype dashboard UI inside ai_RNbBHXRD. Ownership marker (data-module-owner) is present; widget IR subtree alignment is correctly deferred to MOD-DRSAM-DASHBOARD.
critiques.alternative: If strict shell-only landing is required, replace prototype widgets with a minimal placeholder inside ai_RNbBHXRD until DASH-01+ lands; otherwise document brownfield retention as intentional in coverage preflight.

critiques.finding: frontend/src/lib/dashboard/routes.ts exports DASHBOARD_ROUTE but authenticatedRoutes.tsx still hardcodes '/dashboard' string instead of importing the constant.
critiques.alternative: Import DASHBOARD_ROUTE in authenticatedRoutes.tsx (and any navigate targets) for single source of truth.
